stemHtml: An aeroplane pilot is taking a course of training to upgrade from Co-Pilot to Commander. This command course contains many training elements, one of which is to complete…

options.a: Line training under the supervision, in the aeroplane, for at least 10 hours, including at least 5 flight sectors.
options.b: At least 5 hours of training in an FSTD, followed by line training in the aeroplane.
options.c: Line training under the supervision, in the aeroplane, for at least 10 flight sectors.
options.d: At least 10 hours of training in an FSTD, which includes LOFT training.
